calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Plaintiff True Capital Management, Llcs Application For Default Judgment By Court Against Defendants Madison Financial Group Llc Madison Strategic Integration Llc And Horace Madison And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Giselle Casey #8098.
William Bunting, III, Esq. appeared for plaintiff True Capital Management, LLC
Order waiving appearance for live testimony of a witness is in file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Madison financial Group, LLC; Madison Strategic Integration LLC; Horace madison, as Ind. as follows:
Damages/Principal - $75,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $14,162.66
Attorney's Fees - $14,230.00.
Costs - $1,235.00
Cridit for Payment of $7,000.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $97,627,.66.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
